title: Asterisk Voicemail Spool Growth and Storage Pressure
app: Custom TA, HEC, or Universal Forwarder mapping Asterisk logs to `asterisk:pjsip`, `asterisk:cdr`, `asterisk:queue_log`, `asterisk:full`, `asterisk:messages`, `asterisk:security`, `asterisk:ami`
spl:
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:messages" earliest=-30d
| where match(_raw, "(?i)voicemail|vm-?storage|saved.*message|spool")
| eval mb=tonumber(coalesce(vm_size_mb, size_mb, ""))
| timechart span=1d sum(mb) as est_message_mb sum(eval(1)) as vm_events
description: Voicemail spools on appliances fill quietly; exhaustion blocks new messages and breaks message-waiting indicators.
value: Avoids silent loss of regulated callbacks; pairs with OS disk checks for accuracy.
implementation: (1) Prefer host `df` metrics for truth; logs supplement. (2) Alert on growth rate and free space. (3) Automate retention policies.
visualization: Line chart growth; overlay disk free from metrics index if present.
grandmaExplanation: We watch voicemail storage so disks do not fill and block new messages.
